name: Public APIs Animals Category Analysis
description: Fetch public APIs list, filter Animals category, count and report

tasks.name: Fetch Public APIs Data
tasks.description: You MUST call http_request to fetch data from https://api.publicapis.org/entries. Output the FULL raw response body verbatim. Do NOT summarize as 'data fetched' — downstream tasks need the actual JSON data. Output format: complete JSON response.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains raw JSON data from the API endpoint with 'entries' field

tasks.name: Filter and Count Animals Category
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to process the JSON data from task_001. Write Python code that: 1) Parses the JSON from task_001's output, 2) Filters entries where Category == 'Animals', 3) Counts them, 4) Extracts their names (API field). Do NOT invent data. If no Animals category found, say 'not found'. Output format: JSON object with {count: number, names: [list of API names]}.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a count number and a list of API names from the Animals category referencing task_001's data

tasks.name: Generate Final Report
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the results from task_002. Create a human-readable report that includes: 1) The count of APIs in Animals category from task_002, 2) A list of all their names. Save to 'animals_api_report.txt'. Format should be clear and readable with proper labels.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms file was written and contains the count and complete list of animal API names from task_002

metadata.goal: Fetch and analyze public APIs to count and list Animals category entries
